name: The Temple Square
description: You are standing on the temple square. Huge marble steps lead up to the temple gate. The entrance to the Clerics' Guild is to the west, and the old Grunting Boar Inn, is to the east. Just south of here you see the market square, the center of Midgaard.

exit_targets.east: The Entrance Hall Of The Grunting Boar Inn
exit_targets.west: The Entrance To The Clerics' Guild

mobs.desc: A janitor is walking around, cleaning up.
A janitor is walking around, cleaning up.

objects.desc: A large fountain carved from blue-streaked marble is here, bubbling merrily.
